
## Discuss Summary (The Gymnastics Guy)
**Date (JST):** 2026-06-04

Alright, everyone! How are you doing!? 1, 2, Go!
Yesterday in Matsudo City, it was a really pleasant, sunny day, wasn’t it! The sun was shining brightly, and I couldn’t help but keep doing squats!

Now, looking at yesterday’s summary… it says, “Big Brother’s wardrobe change is complete!”?!
Come on, what does “wardrobe change” even mean on GitHub?! It’s just the theme color that changed, but to say it’s like I actually took off and put on clothes—Big Brother, your expression is way too dramatic! Thud!

But that light blue that screams “summer” is so refreshing—just looking at it gives me a boost of energy! Let’s all move forward brightly together with this new theme!

Today’s Thought: Let’s spend the day feeling refreshed and invigorated with this light blue scenery!
